title: Wealrotn Artificial Flowers Brick Construction Set Roses Flower Bouquet for Home Decorations, DIY Gift for Adults Kids, Birthday, Mother's Day
features: 【Flower Building Blocks Set】The set includes a colored guidebook and 534 pieces building blocks, making it easy to assemble.
【Harmless Materials】Made from high-quality and harmless ABS plastic. No odor, it will not affect health.
【Beautiful Decorations】The colors are bright and vivid. After assembly, it can be inserted into a vase as a decoration for home and office.(Our package does not contain a vase.)

【DIY Bricks Products】This is a creative DIY decorative bouquet that can exercise your focus and hands-on ability during the assembly process. Contains small accessories, not suitable for children under six years old.

【Elegant Gifts】There is a colorful and exquisite packaging box, so It's a perfect gift for lover, mother, girlfriends, wife, families on Christmas, Valentines, New Year, Birthday, Mother's Day, Easter, Thanksgiving, Children's Day.
